subcodes.first_line: In these days the beloved friends must seize this precious opportunity and arise with utmost strength to render service [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اين ايّام بايد حضرات احبّا وقت را غنيمت شمرند و بمنتهای قوّت بر خدمت برخيزند
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @zeal and fervor in teaching the Cause, @devotion; sacrifice; consecration in teaching the Cause
